subject: README vs Codebase Gap Report
body:
## README vs Codebase Gap Report

### Summary
The root `README.md` was last substantively updated around April 2026 and has drifted significantly from the current codebase. The most critical gaps are a wildly incorrect `MainWindow.xaml.cs` line count, nine stale helper-class line counts, an incomplete AI team roster, a missing project-structure entry for `VoiceHeuristics/` and `docs/`, and zero documentation for at least eight major feature systems added since the README was written.

---

### 1. `MainWindow.xaml.cs` Line Count — Critical Stale Stat

| Source | Lines |
|---|---|
| README states | 5,605 (down from 8,305) |
| **Actual today** | **30,985** |

The README's entire narrative around MainWindow decomposition is now misleading — the file has grown by ~5× since the stat was recorded.

---

### 2. All Nine Helper-Class Line Counts Are Outdated

| File | README | Actual |
|---|---|---|
| `AgentStatusCard.cs` | 322 | 404 |
| `ColorUtilities.cs` | 54 | 65 |
| `SquadCliAdapter.cs` | 124 | 179 |
| `PushToTalkController.cs` | 243 | 289 |
| `MarkdownDocumentRenderer.cs` | 772 | 1,183 |
| `AgentThreadRegistry.cs` | 840 | 1,076 |
| `TranscriptConversationManager.cs` | 481 | 1,780 |
| `BackgroundTaskPresenter.cs` | 813 | 1,291 |
| `PromptExecutionController.cs` | 923 | 2,468 |

Every class has grown substantially. `TranscriptConversationManager` (~3.7×) and `PromptExecutionController` (~2.7×) have seen the largest expansion.

---

### 3. AI Team Table — Missing Seven Agents

README lists 6 agents; `.squad/team.md` now has 13:

| Agent | Role | In README?|
|---|---|---|
| Orion Vale | Lead Architect | ❌ Missing |
| Lyra Morn | WPF & UI Specialist | ✅|
| Arjun Sen | C# Backend Services Specialist | ✅ |
| Talia Rune | TypeScript & SDK Bridge Specialist | ✅ |
| Jae Min Kade | Deployment & Infrastructure Specialist | ✅ |
| Vesper Knox | Testing & Quality Specialist | ✅ |
| Mira Quill | Documentation & Memory Specialist | ✅ |
| Sorin Pyre | Performance Engineer | ❌ Missing |
| Atlas Wren | Mac & Cross-Platform Specialist | ❌ Missing |
| Scribe | Session Logger | ❌ Missing |
| Ralph | Work Monitor | ❌ Missing |
| Argus Weld | Maintenance Coordinator | ❌ Missing |
| Malik Graves | Markdown Specialist | ❌ Missing |

---

### 4. Project Structure Table — Missing Directories

The README's folder table omits two directories present at the repo root:

| Folder | What it is |
|---|---|
| `VoiceHeuristics/` | Standalone C# library (`VoiceInsertionHeuristics`) published as a NuGet package. Provides context-aware speech-to-text insertion heuristics (filler-word stripping, capitalisation, mid-sentence continuation). Has its own `README.md` and NuGet badge. |
| `docs/` | Full GitBook-style documentation site (`_config.yml`, `SUMMARY.md`, structured sections: getting-started, features, concepts, reference, panels, customization, options). The `docs/README.md` notes the content is largely AI-generated and unreviewed. |

Also present but undocumented: `Run/`, `artifacts/`, `installer/`.

---

### 5. Major Features With Zero README Coverage

The following feature systems exist in `SquadDash/` with no mention in `README.md`:

| Feature | Key Files | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Inbox system** | `InboxMessage.cs`, `InboxPanelController.cs`, `InboxStore.cs`, `InboxMessageParser.cs`, `InboxMessageWindow.cs` | Full message inbox — agents can deliver structured messages to the user|
| **Maintenance system** | `MaintenanceRunner.cs`, `MaintenancePanelController.cs`, `MaintenanceMdParser.cs`, `MaintenanceMdConfig.cs`, `MaintenanceTaskEditorWindow.cs`, `MaintenanceStateStore.cs` | Scheduled background maintenance tasks driven by `.squad/maintenance.md` |
| **Loop mode** | `LoopController.cs`, `LoopMdParser.cs`, `LoopOutputStore.cs`, `LoopOutputWindow.cs`, `LoopPickerDialog.cs`, `LoopMergedViewWindow.cs` | Batch/loop prompt execution with output tracking |
| **Host commands** | `HostCommandRegistry.cs`, `HostCommandExecutor.cs`, `HostCommandParser.cs`, `HostCommandDescriptor.cs` | Plugin-like slash-command extension system |
| **Notes panel** | `NotesPanelController.cs`, `NotesStore.cs`, `NoteItem.cs` | Persistent notes panel|
| **Commit approval workflow** | `CommitApprovalStore.cs`, `CommitApprovalWindow.cs`, `CommitApprovalItem.cs` | Review queue for agent-proposed commits |
| **Annotation + Screenshot tools** | `AnnotationArrow.cs`, `AnnotationRect.cs`, `AnnotationText.cs`, `ScreenshotOverlayWindow.cs`, `ScreenshotAnnotationSidecar.cs` | Full screenshot capture and annotation overlay|
| **Doc revision workflow** | `DocRevisePopup.cs`, `MarkdownRevisionExecutor.cs`, `RevisionResultWindow.cs` | In-app markdown document revision and diff workflow |
| **Tasks panel** | `TasksPanelController.cs`, `TasksPanelParser.cs`, `TasksContextBuilder.cs` | Agent task tracking panel |
| **Push notifications** | `PushNotificationService.cs` | Background push notification delivery |
| **Idle detection** | `IdleDetectionService.cs` | User idle detection (powers maintenance scheduling) |

---

### 6. Minor: Tool Icon Table May Be Incomplete

The README tool-icon table (§ *Thinking Block — Tool Call Icons*) lists 12 tools. Newer agent tools (`read_agent`, `write_agent`, `list_agents`, `ask_user`) are not listed — worth verifying whether `ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` handles them and if so, whether the table should be updated.

---

### Priority

1. **High** — Line counts and MainWindow stat give a false picture of codebase health to contributors.
2. **High** — Missing team members could cause routing confusion for new contributors.
3. **Medium** — Missing `VoiceHeuristics/` and `docs/` in project structure.
4. **Medium** — Major features (Inbox, Maintenance, Loop) deserve at least a one-liner in the README.
5. **Low** — Tool icon table completeness check.

actions.label: Update README
actions.prompt:
Mira: a maintenance audit found that README.md at the repo root (D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\README.md) has significant drift from the current codebase. Please update it to fix the following gaps:

1. **MainWindow.xaml.cs line count** — README says '5,605 lines (down from 8,305)'. Actual count today is30,985. Update the architecture section accordingly.

2. **Helper class line counts** — All nine entries in the helper-class table are stale. Actual counts:
   - AgentStatusCard.cs: 404
   - ColorUtilities.cs: 65
   - SquadCliAdapter.cs: 179
   - PushToTalkController.cs: 289
   - MarkdownDocumentRenderer.cs: 1,183
   - AgentThreadRegistry.cs: 1,076
   - TranscriptConversationManager.cs: 1,780
   - BackgroundTaskPresenter.cs: 1,291
   - PromptExecutionController.cs: 2,468

3. **AI Team table** — README lists only 6 agents. team.md (.squad/team.md) now has 13. Add the missing ones: Orion Vale (Lead Architect), Sorin Pyre (Performance Engineer), Atlas Wren (Mac & Cross-Platform Specialist), Scribe (Session Logger), Ralph (Work Monitor), Argus Weld (Maintenance Coordinator), Malik Graves (Markdown Specialist).

4. **Project structure table** — Add entries for:
   - `VoiceHeuristics/` — standalone NuGet library for voice insertion heuristics
   - `docs/` — GitBook-style documentation site

5. **New major features** — Add a brief'Recent Features' or expanded 'Architecture' section (or notes in existing sections) covering: Inbox system, Maintenance system, Loop mode, Host commands, Notes panel, Commit approval workflow. At minimum a sentence each so contributors know these systems exist.

Do not change any source code — only README.md. Commit the change with a clear message.
actions.hint: Delegates README update to Mira Quill

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
